message:
fix(bench): honest comparison with same iterations and clear scope

- Use same ITERATIONS (5) for all methods - was 1000 vs 5
- Exclude setup time fairly for all (data pre-loaded)
- Add NumPy einsum as fair vectorized comparison (2.3x slower)
- Clearly document what benchmark measures and does NOT measure
- Real insight: @logic_table is 2.3x faster than NumPy for in-memory ops
- UDF overhead (78-153x) is Python callback cost, not DB performance
